message:
test(robot): add adapter and SSE attention unit tests [bd-j9jo3.9.8, bd-j9jo3.8.3]

Add comprehensive unit test coverage for:

adapters (normalize_test.go, promotion_test.go):
- ComputeSourceHealth: healthy/degraded/unavailable/empty states
- ComputeDegradedFeatures: source-to-feature dependency mapping
- computeQuotaReasonCode, reasonToStatus: threshold boundaries
- ShouldPromote: promotion rule evaluation (severity, duration, type, repeat)
- PromoteToIncident: incident creation and severity mapping
- ComputeIncidentsSummary: aggregate statistics
- matchesPattern: glob pattern matching

serve (server.go, server_test.go):
- WSAttentionSub: WebSocket attention subscription state
- Attention stream parity with SSE semantics
- Cursor tracking, filtering, and heartbeat behavior

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
